reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/651290643148390126/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cDREa0tnEAE

reviews.comment:
Si tenes moto y no tenes chaleco reflactario no te cargan combustible las demas YPF no te lo piden. Siempre hay una sola persona en la caja y tiene que preparar cafe, eso genera que se llene de gente la fila y tardes 15 minutos para ser atendido.

(Translated by Google)
If you have a motorcycle and don't have a reflective vest, they won't fill your tank; other YPF stations don't require it. There's always only one person at the register, and they have to make coffee, which causes the line to get very long and makes you wait 15 minutes to be served.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su comentario y reseña, l@ esperamos pronto para mejorar la experiencia!
